response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an accomplished full-stack and web engineer but is fundamentally misaligned with this role. His C++ experience amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments and a thesis project, falling far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. He has no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets systems background—his only fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) was TypeScript/GraphQL work unrelated to financial products. SQL Server and Oracle are absent from his profile, which centers on MongoDB and general SQL.
strengths: Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps experience across multiple roles, matching an optional desirable skill
Java background from Altom Consulting satisfies one of the optional technical preferences
Strong communication skills evidenced by conference talks and multi-day workshop facilitation
concerns: C++ experience is approximately six months (NI LabWindows) versus the 5–10 years required, and no Windows-platform C++ work is described
Zero fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is primarily MongoDB and generic SQL
